message:
fix(web): use matchAll to avoid regex lastIndex bug in health check

The global regex /§(\d+)/g was defined outside the loop, causing the
lastIndex property to persist between entries. This could cause section
reference matches to be missed in subsequent "why" texts.

Use String.matchAll() which creates a fresh iterator for each string
and doesn't have this issue.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
